inline_comments: Return a promise that resolves when the signal is aborted. If no signal is provided, the promise stays pending forever. When provided, `onAbort` runs once before the promise resolves.
Keep a passive account task alive until abort, then run optional cleanup.

Keep a channel/provider task pending until the HTTP server closes. When an abort signal is provided, `onAbort` is invoked once and should trigger server shutdown. The returned promise resolves only after `close`.
